evals.prompt: Rewrite DaisyUI/instruction.md, DaisyUI/verifier_checklist.json, and DaisyUI/rubric.json so the task is a good application on stack A (React, Zustand, Tailwind). Primary collection is Users with full CRUD, at least Operations Overview + All Users views, domain state (status/role/filters), no localStorage/sessionStorage, plain-text instruction sections, hover required in motion, and no Zustand named inside core_features. Align checklist and rubric to the instruction. Work from the snapshots under the DaisyUI task folder.
evals.expected_output: Three files matching the good-app contract: summary stack line; plain-text XML sections; behavioral core_features; requirements with Zustand contracts; REST checklist After/On load/When items; rubric criteria exactly Core Features / Visual Design / Motion / Technical Implementation with positive and negative hli verifiers.

evals.prompt: CameraExposure currently reads like a static UI mock. Upgrade /Users/kurrytran/frontend-repository/CameraExposure/instruction.md plus verifier_checklist.json and rubric.json into a good application on stack E (React, Zustand, CSS Modules): primary presets collection with create/edit/delete, at least two views, domain state beyond CRUD, in-memory Zustand only (no localStorage/sessionStorage), plain text sections, hover in motion, checklist + rubric consistent with the new instruction.
evals.expected_output: CameraExposure task trio cleared for good-app bar with stack E summary, no browser storage, state library only in summary/requirements, browser-observable checklist, and four exact rubric criteria.

evals.prompt: Assign stack B (Vue 3, Pinia, Tailwind) to FinanceReports and produce instruction.md, verifier_checklist.json, and rubric.json for a good application under /Users/kurrytran/frontend-repository/FinanceReports. evals.expected_output: FinanceReports folder with Vue/Pinia/Tailwind summary, domain-appropriate CRUD collection, Pinia contracts in requirements only, After/On load/When checklist, and rubric with Core Features / Visual Design / Motion / Technical Implementation.

evals.prompt: Upgrade /Users/kurrytran/frontend-repository/TripItinerary into a good application: rewrite instruction.md, verifier_checklist.json, and rubric.json. Preserve the existing stack from that folder's summary (Vue 3, Pinia, UnoCSS). Primary CRUD collection must be trip-domain (days and/or stops), not Users. Require at least two views (list vs map), domain state beyond CRUD, in-memory Pinia only (no localStorage/sessionStorage), plain-text instruction sections, hover in motion, and checklist + rubric aligned to the instruction.
evals.expected_output: TripItinerary task trio cleared for good-app bar: Vue 3 + Pinia + UnoCSS summary preserved, trip-domain CRUD (days/stops), list vs map views, no browser storage, state library only in summary/requirements, browser-observable checklist, four exact rubric criteria.
